item.name: Nymeia's Wheel
item.description:
An ancient wavekin allegedly born of divine error─or divine clumsiness, at the least.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: Legends say that each time the goddess Nymeia drops a spinning wheel, it falls from the heavens and becomes a shell for one of these enormous tortoises. The sheer number of these wavekin suggests that even the Twelve are fallible.
